host.useTheseHostSettings: Use these host settings to organize your meeting. Only hosts have access to these options.

host.preventNewParticipantsFrom: Prevent new participants from joining. Currently in the meeting can stay.
host.ifTurnedOnYou: If turned on, you may be removing people who use an outdated version of the Meet app or meeting hardware that isn't from Google
host.ifTurnedOnEveryone: If turned on, everyone can send messages in the call
host.theseSettingsAlsoApply: These settings also apply to future instances of this meeting
host.hostMustJoinBefore: Host must join before others can participate
host.noOneNeedsPermission: No one needs permission to participate. Anyone can join.
host.peopleCanParticipateWithout: People can participate without asking for permission if they're part of your organization or invited with their account. Anyone can dial in.
host.peopleCanOnlyParticipate: People can only participate without asking for permission if they're invited with their account.
host.allowParticipantsToShare: Allow participants to share add-on activities
host.ifTurnedOnOnly: If turned on, only activities started by a host can be shared with others
host.allowThirdpartyAppsTo: Allow third-party apps to collect audio and video
host.ifTurnedOnThirdparty: If turned on, third-party apps have no access to Meet call audio and video when users ask about it
